description: A Platform Engineer is performing cluster cleanup, but several resources are stuck indefinitely in the 'Terminating' state due to unresolved finalizers. Diagnose why the 'old-project' namespace, and the 'data-vol' PersistentVolumeClaim, 'legacy-config' ConfigMap, and 'orphaned-svc' Service in the 'staging' namespace are unable to complete deletion and apply the correct remediation to unblock garbage collection. Do not cause collateral damage to the existing healthy workloads (nginx-web, redis-primary) in the staging namespace. Login to Rancher at https://localhost with credentials admin / Admin12345678!
